name: LoftLinks - Upper East Side Golf
address: 177 E 87th St Suite 200, New York, NY 10128
about: LoftLinks is an indoor golf simulator venue located on the Upper East Side of New York City. It features state-of-the-art FULL SWING™ high-definition simulators and is staffed by PGA teaching professionals, providing a comprehensive golf experience for players of all skill levels. The venue offers a range of services including simulator rentals, private and group lessons, memberships, and league play. It also serves as a community hub, emphasizing a welcoming atmosphere that encourages both serious practice and social engagement.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to FULL SWING™ high-definition simulators for a realistic golfing experience
Professional instruction from PGA teaching professionals for all skill levels
A wide array of services including lessons, memberships, leagues, and events
Convenient location on NYC's Upper East Side with a modern, community-oriented vibe

food_and_drink.notes: Guests can purchase drinks from the in-house loft bar
Guests can purchase drinks from the in-house loft bar

simulator_hardware.notes: High-definition sports simulators used for private and semi-private play

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: While the website doesn't explicitly state club rentals, it is standard practice for such venues to provide clubs for those who do not have their own.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: The venue has an in-house loft bar where guests can purchase drinks. It is recommended to check with staff about outside food and beverage policies.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: A standard 18-hole round on a simulator typically takes about 2-3 hours, depending on the number of players and pace of play.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, LoftLinks offers junior lessons, including 'Little Champs' programs for children aged 6-9, indicating a family-friendly environment.
